text.title: Hook Bank Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: indie hacker building a hook bank on X over 4 weeks.

section.title: Week 1 — bootstrap snapshot
section.p: Author exports the last 90 days from X analytics: 47 posts, 6 patterns surfaced informally (before-after, mistake-confession, data-drop, contrarian, question, list-promise). Median impressions_24h on X = 1400.

list.item: "Yesterday: 4h debugging Rails. Today: one CLI." → 2840 imp / 14 replies → ratio 2.03 → SPIKED, before-after.
"Shipped a $0 invoice to 312 customers last night. Postmortem." → 11400 imp / 38 replies → ratio 8.1 → SPIKED, mistake-confession.
"47% of churn happens in the first 48h. Here's what I changed." → 2240 imp / 9 replies → ratio 1.6 → AVERAGE, data-drop.
"Excited to launch v2 today!" → 480 imp / 1 reply → ratio 0.34 → FLOPPED, generic.

section.title: Week 2 — pre-write remix in practice
section.p: Author opens the editor with the SPIKED top-10 view bookmarked. Picks mistake-confession (highest ratio). Drafts: "Burnt 14h on a feature flag bug that was a typo." Posts. Result: 5800 imp / 22 replies → SPIKED. Added to bank, flop_streak[mistake-confession] resets to 0.

section.title: Week 4 — retirement triggers
section.p: "generic" pattern has FLOPPED three times in a row (480, 612, 380 imp). Retired per r5 with reason "no hook hand, equivalent to no pattern". patterns_active drops from 7 to 6 — under the cap, no demotion needed.

section.title: Month 1 — review and promote
section.p: Per-pattern median over 30 days: mistake-confession 8200, before-after 2900, data-drop 2100, contrarian 1600, question 1200, list-promise 1100. Promotion: mistake-confession moved to position 1. Demotion: question marked "watch list — one more flop and it retires". Summary published as a build-update post titled "What I learned reviewing my hook bank — 6 patterns left, 1 dominates".

text.example: Author with ≥30 posts → preconditions met → bank file v1 committed → weekly classification → r4 remix shaved draft time 20→3 min → monthly review promotes mistake-confession → bank compounds; APPROVE via run-the-checklist.
